sc.dei.s: FIGS discloses DEI initiatives including supplier diversity program and published 2023 diversity report with hiring metrics.
sc.environment.s: No documented EPA enforcement, pollution events, or certified science-based emission targets on record.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair-labor findings, OSHA fatalities, or named class-action lawsuits on record.
sc.charity.s: FIGS Foundation distributed $25M+ across healthcare worker support, disaster relief, and education programs since 2019.
sc.animals.s: Apparel company; no animal testing or Leaping Bunny certification documented.
sc.guns.s: Medical apparel manufacturer; firearms not a product line.
sc.privacy.s: No documented HIBP breaches or FTC privacy enforcement actions on record.
